Label: /FR-U-10/
Issue: Does not specify the format for listing neural networks
Correction: The system shall list neural networks in a drop-down menu with each entry showing the network name and version.

Label: /FR-U-30/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for importing neural network topology
Correction: The system shall support importing neural network topologies in ONNX format only.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats only.

Label: /FR-U-100/
Issue: Does not specify the format for displaying inference results
Correction: The system shall display inference results in a pop-up window with a scrollable list if multiple results are present.

Label: /FR-U-110/
Issue: Does not specify the format for exporting results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in a CSV file format.

Label: /FR-A-10/
Issue: Does not specify the types of error and warning messages
Correction: The system shall display error messages for invalid selections and warning messages for suboptimal configurations.

Label: /FR-A-30/
Issue: Does not specify the types of arguments to be checked for validity
Correction: The system shall check the validity of selected neural network, hardware component, and input image.

Label: /FR-A-70/
Issue: Does not specify the format for the runtime log file
Correction: The system shall write the runtime log in a plain text file format with timestamps for each event.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: Does not specify the minimum dimensions for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images with a minimum resolution of 224x224 pixels.

Label: /PD20/
Issue: Does not specify the compatibility requirements for imported neural networks
Correction: The system shall ensure that imported neural networks are compatible with the selected hardware components.

Label: /PD30/
Issue: Does not specify the format for inference results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall store inference results and diagnostic data in a structured JSON format.

Label: /TC-INF-10/
Issue: Does not specify the expected format of the valid result
Correction: The system shall display the inference result in a pop-up window with the confidence score and diagnostic data.

Label: /TC-ERR-10/
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors for invalid neural networks
Correction: The system shall display an error message for unsupported file formats or corrupted neural network files.

Label: /TC-ERR-20/
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors for missing hardware components
Correction: The system shall display an error message if the selected hardware component is not connected or recognized.

Label: /TC-ERR-30/
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors for invalid images
Correction: The system shall display an error message for unsupported image formats or corrupted image files.

Label: /TC-OPT-10/
Issue: Does not specify the expected behavior after aborting an inference
Correction: The system shall display a message indicating that the inference was aborted and reset the interface to the initial state.
